text: PLACEHOLDER — This personal website is now live! Mỗi tin là một object: date dạng YYYY-MM, text là nội dung (có thể chứa HTML), link (tùy chọn) trỏ tới bài viết/trang liên quan.
PLACEHOLDER — Ví dụ: Our paper on XYZ was accepted at ABC 2026! 🎉
PLACEHOLDER — Ví dụ: Started working as an undergraduate research assistant at XYZ Lab.
